cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Game throws an exception when trying to load. Neither WineDebugger nor Proton.log show why. SteamPlay/Proton installed all (32-bit) Windows Dependencies files, folders and dlls. Using Protontricks, nor Proton launch options helped. This is an Ogre3D based game, which should run no problem. If anyone can figure out what the bug is, keep us posted. (Going to report this to Valve's github)
title: Army General
